extracted.title: NEXUS Customer Specific Operational Flow Order -- LIFTED EFF 3/5
extracted.description:
Effective 9:00AM CCT March 5, 2026, NEXUS Gas Transmission, LLC (NEXUS) is lifting the customer specific Operational Flow Order issued on March 1, 2026.

Operational Area / Gas Day March 4 / Gas Day March 5 and until further notice
Customer Specific / OFO In Effect (No Due Pipe OFO 5% / 250) / No OFO

Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.
